_note: Founder portfolio for the CEO LinkedIn rotation. Edit freely. 'logo' is a filename in scripts/assets/logos/ (square PNG, transparent bg preferred). 'colors' will be tuned to match each logo once provided.

projects.name: Nexitel
projects.blurb: A prepaid wireless / SIM carrier in the USA: cheap unlimited talk & text, nationwide 5G on major networks, eSIM and physical SIM, easy number transfer. Built for families, travelers, immigrants and budget-conscious users who don't want a contract.

projects.name: Nexitel Dealer Program
projects.blurb: The Nexitel dealer/reseller program: a way for shops, entrepreneurs and side-hustlers to earn recurring income by selling and activating Nexitel prepaid SIMs and plans. Low barrier to entry, real margins, support provided.

projects.name: Nexivolt
projects.tagline: Multi-carrier SIM activation & recharge, one portal
projects.blurb: A multi-carrier SIM activation and recharge dealer portal. Lets telecom dealers manage activations and top-ups across multiple carriers from a single dashboard, with admin/dealer/team roles. The operating system for a modern telecom dealership.

projects.name: One Tap Alert
projects.tagline: One tap. Help is on the way.
projects.blurb: A personal-safety SOS app for iPhone and Android. One-tap SOS alerts your emergency contacts with live location, a Safety Timer that auto-alerts if you don't check in, real-time location sharing, and an encrypted vault for IDs/medical info. Privacy-first: no background tracking, no data selling.

projects.name: Pawmance
projects.blurb: A health-verified pet socialization and matchmaking platform — owners find compatible, vetted playmates and companions for their dogs, cats, rabbits, horses and other animals, then arrange safe playdates. It is about friendship and play, not breeding.

projects.name: Friend-A
projects.tagline: Meet real friends — or earn as one
projects.blurb: A two-sided platonic friendship and companionship marketplace. Members meet verified people nearby for activity partners and genuine friendship; providers earn money offering paid platonic companionship for events, dining, sightseeing and hobbies. Strictly platonic — never dating or romance.
